title: Verify: [9.5] Load Ordnance order replenishes from colony stockpile
body: The manual states that the Load Ordnance fleet order replenishes missile stockpiles from a colony's ordnance stores. This needs verification against the game database or live testing.

title: Verify: [14.3] Stationary facilities service unlimited ships simultaneously
body: Section 14.3 claims that stationary facilities (shipyards, maintenance facilities) can service an unlimited number of ships at the same time. Needs live testing.

title: Verify: [8.5/12.3] Box launcher reload 10x slower at OTPs vs hangars
body: Claims that box launchers reload at 1/10th speed at ordnance transfer points compared to hangars. Needs database or testing verification.

title: Verify: Section 13.1 THM and fortification interaction formula
body: The ground combat section states a specific formula for how THM (Terrain Habitability Modifier) interacts with fortification level. Formula: effective_fortification = base_fortification * THM. Needs verification.

title: Verify: Section 5.2.8 PPV and protection mechanics
body: Planetary Protection Value (PPV) mechanics described in section 5.2.8 claim specific formulas for shield and armor interactions. Needs database verification.

title: Verify: Section 14.1.2 — Does fuel consumption scale with actual travel speed at runtime?
body: The manual claims fuel consumption is calculated based on actual travel speed, not rated engine speed. Needs live testing or database verification of the fuel consumption formula.
